mapper.sql: d.id as d_id, d.programVal as d_programVal, d.calType as d_calType, d.calMode as d_calMode, d.calPole as d_calPole, d.calResolution as d_calResolution, d.testState as d_testState, d.meterVal as d_meterVal, d.primitiveAdc as d_primitiveAdc, d.finalAdc as d_finalAdc, d.theoryAdc as d_theoryAdc, d.theoryProgramK as d_theoryProgramK, d.theoryProgramB as d_theoryProgramB, d.theoryAdcK as d_theoryAdcK, d.theoryAdcB as d_theoryAdcB, d.programK as d_programK, d.programB as d_programB, d.adcK as d_adcK, d.adcB as d_adcB, d.adcK_check as d_adcK_check, d.adcB_check as d_adcB_check, d.miliSeconds as d_miliSeconds, d.boardIndex as d_boardIndex, d.chnIndexInDevice as d_chnIndexInDevice, d.info as d_info
